name: Hmc (Nj)
description_short: ERROR: This is not a financial services company. The website is Hello Minecraft! Launcher, a free open-source game launcher for Minecraft modding — not a consumer finance product.
description_long: CRITICAL MISCATEGORIZATION DETECTED: The company profile 'Hmc (Nj)' has been assigned to 'payday-alternatives,' but the actual website content (https://hmcl.huangyuhui.net/) is the Hello Minecraft! Launcher — a completely unrelated software application. The launcher is a free, open-source tool for managing Minecraft game installations, mods, and customization, not a financial services provider. The website is in Chinese and English and describes gaming features exclusively: multi-system support, mod pack imports/exports (Curse, MultiMC, Modrinth), mod loaders (Fabric, Forge, LiteLoader), theme customization, and GitHub-hosted source code under GPLv3 license. This represents either a critical data matching error in the CreditDoc database or a website URL mismatch. The company has been active since 2015 with 110+ GitHub contributors, but it operates in the gaming software space, not consumer finance. There are zero consumer finance services, lending products, credit services, or financial tools offered. This profile cannot legitimately exist in a consumer finance database.
